summary: Iteration 63: Tested Creative Brief modal feature. All 12 tests passed. The Brief button was correctly removed from TopBar. Creative Brief is now accessible only from ProjectHub quick actions. Modal opens as centered popup (not side panel), has collapsible sections, form fields work correctly, and Start Building button enables when elevator_pitch, brand_name, or must_have_features is filled.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Creative Brief modal feature fully tested and working. Login with REDACTED_LEAKED_USER works. To access Creative Brief: login -> click on a project -> in ProjectHub click 'Creative Brief' quick action card.

test_results.1_brief_button_not_in_topbar: PASS - canvas-btn (Brief button) NOT found in TopBar
test_results.2_creative_brief_in_projecthub: PASS - hub-action-creative-brief exists in Quick Actions
test_results.3_modal_is_centered: PASS - Modal opens centered (not side panel), width=580px
test_results.4_form_fields_exist: PASS - elevator_pitch, target_audience, primary_goal, brand_name all present
test_results.5_collapsible_sections: PASS - 6 sections found, expand/collapse works correctly
test_results.6_start_building_disabled_empty: PASS - Button disabled when no content filled
test_results.7_start_building_enabled_elevator_pitch: PASS - Button enabled when elevator_pitch filled
test_results.8_start_building_enabled_brand_name: PASS - Button enabled when brand_name filled
test_results.9_start_building_enabled_must_have: PASS - Button enabled when must_have_features filled
test_results.10_x_button_closes_modal: PASS - Modal closes when X button clicked
test_results.11_cancel_button_closes_modal: PASS - Modal closes when Cancel button clicked
test_results.12_overlay_click_closes_modal: PASS - Modal closes when clicking outside (on overlay)
